list.name: project
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT project FROM sessions ORDER BY project

list.name: session
list.query: SELECT session_id AS __value, session_id || ' (' || started_at::date || ')' AS __text FROM sessions WHERE project = '$project' AND is_subagent = false ORDER BY started_at DESC

panels.title: Sessions (click a session_id to filter)
panels.description: All sessions for the selected project (subagents excluded). Click a row's session_id to load it into the rest of the dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.session_id, s.started_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(s.ended_at, MAX(m.timestamp)) - s.started_at))::bigint AS duration_s, COUNT(m.message_uuid) AS messages, COALESCE(SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens, s.model, s.git_branch, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM s.started_at) * 1000)::bigint AS started_ms, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM COALESCE(s.ended_at, MAX(m.timestamp))) * 1000)::bigint AS ended_ms FROM sessions s LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.session_id = s.session_id LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE s.project = '$project' AND s.is_subagent = false GROUP BY s.session_id, s.started_at, s.ended_at, s.model, s.git_branch ORDER BY s.started_at DESC

panels.title: human_input
panels.description: User-typed prompts — the text you write in the Claude Code CLI.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS messages FROM messages WHERE session_id = '$session' AND prompt_type = 'human_input'

panels.title: assistant_text
panels.description: Claude's natural-language replies and reasoning text.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS messages FROM messages WHERE session_id = '$session' AND prompt_type = 'assistant_text'

panels.title: tool_use
panels.description: Claude invoking a tool (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, etc.). Stored as tool name plus a brief argument summary.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS messages FROM messages WHERE session_id = '$session' AND prompt_type = 'tool_use'

panels.title: tool_result
panels.description: Output a tool returns back to Claude. Stored as tool name plus the first 200 chars of output.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS messages FROM messages WHERE session_id = '$session' AND prompt_type = 'tool_result'

panels.title: Prompt List
panels.description: Chronological message log for the selected session. Shows each prompt/response with its token cost.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.timestamp, m.prompt_type, m.tool_name, LEFT(m.prompt_text, 120) AS prompt_preview, COALESCE(t.input_tokens, 0) AS input, COALESCE(t.output_tokens, 0) AS output, COALESCE(t.cache_read_tokens, 0) AS cache_read FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session' ORDER BY m.timestamp

panels.title: Total Input Tokens
panels.description: Aggregate input tokens for the selected session.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(t.input_tokens) AS total_input FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session'

panels.title: Total Output Tokens
panels.description: Aggregate output tokens for the selected session.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(t.output_tokens) AS total_output FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session'

panels.title: Total Cache Read Tokens
panels.description: Aggregate cache read tokens for the selected session.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(t.cache_read_tokens) AS total_cache_read FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session'

panels.title: Message Count
panels.description: Total number of messages in the selected session.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(m.message_uuid) AS message_count FROM messages m WHERE m.session_id = '$session'

panels.title: Session Timeline
panels.description: Per-prompt token consumption as bars (left axis) with cumulative token consumption over time as lines (right axis). Bars show the tokens used by each individual prompt; lines show the running total per prompt type.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.timestamp AS time, m.prompt_type, COALESCE(t.input_tokens, 0) + COALESCE(t.output_tokens, 0) AS per_prompt FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session' ORDER BY m.timestamp

SELECT m.timestamp AS time, m.prompt_type, SUM(COALESCE(t.input_tokens, 0) + COALESCE(t.output_tokens, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY m.prompt_type ORDER BY m.timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative FROM messages m LEFT JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.session_id = '$session' ORDER BY m.timestamp

panels.title: Archetype Mix (%)
panels.description:
Tool-token percentage by archetype within this session, normalized to 100%.

Bash subcategories are rolled up:
- read / search / git-read → exploration
- test / build / deps → build_test
- infra-* / db → infra_ops
- fileops / git-write / exec → shell_ops

Non-Bash tools are mapped by name:
- Read / Grep / Glob → exploration
- Edit / Write / MultiEdit → active_coding
- Task / Agent / TaskCreate / TaskUpdate / TaskList / TaskOutput / TaskStop → self_orchestration
- WebFetch / WebSearch / ToolSearch → research
- mcp__* → mcp

targets.rawSql: WITH session_total AS (SELECT SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens)::numeric AS total FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.session_id = '$session' AND mc.archetype IS NOT NULL), by_archetype AS (SELECT mc.archetype, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens)::numeric AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.session_id = '$session' AND mc.archetype IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mc.archetype) SELECT 'session' AS scope, b.archetype, (b.tokens / NULLIF(st.total, 0))::float AS pct FROM by_archetype b CROSS JOIN session_total st ORDER BY pct DESC
